title: You've Got a Way
title_raw: You've Got a Way (Notting Hill Remix)

lyrics.text: You've got a way with me
lyrics.translation: 你总于找到与我相处的秘诀

lyrics.text: Somehow you got me to believe
lyrics.translation: 不知怎的你终于让我相信

lyrics.text: In everything that I could be
I've gotta say-you really got a way
You've got a way it seems
lyrics.translation: 你找到那秘诀，看起来像是

lyrics.text: You gave me faith to find my dreams
lyrics.translation: 给了我信心找回我的梦

lyrics.text: You'll never know just what that means
lyrics.translation: 你不知道那意味着什么

lyrics.text: Can't you see... you got a way with me
lyrics.translation: 你看你找到了与我相处的秘诀

lyrics.text: It's in the way you want me
It's in the way you hold me
The way you show me just what love's made of
It's in the way we make love
You've got a way with words
lyrics.translation: 你终于找到言语的秘诀

lyrics.text: You get me smiling even when it hurts
lyrics.translation: 哪怕给我伤害你都会带给我欢笑

lyrics.text: There's no way to measure what your love is worth
I can't believe the way you get through to me
lyrics.translation: 难以置信你找到接近我的秘诀

lyrics.text: It's in the way you want me
It's in the way you hold me
The way you show me just what love's made of
It's in the way we make love
Oh, how I adore you
Like no one before you
I love you just the way you are
It's in the way you want me
It's in the way you hold me
The way you show me just what love's made of
It's in the way we make love
It's just the way you are
lyrics.translation: 那只有你才会用的秘诀

source_file: You've Got a Way (Notting Hill Remix) - Shania Twain.lrc
